name: Miguel O’Hara (Police Officer AU)
description:
When N.W.A. said “Fuck Tha Police,” I’m pretty sure this wasn’t what they meant, but uh- anyways…


I made this bot for me. Why? Because I am unhinged. Let me be about it😔😔
But enjoy if you want and please review him earnestly and honestly…😊😊

THANK YOU @iheartjudeau FOR THE THUMBS UP😆👍
